timeline.title: The day we met
timeline.desc: Write your story here — how you met, what happened, how you felt.

timeline.title: First trip together
timeline.desc: Describe your first adventure. Where did you go?

timeline.title: One whole year
timeline.desc: Your first anniversary. What did you do?

timeline.title: Still being written…
timeline.desc: This story isn't finished. Add new entries as you make more memories.

notes.text: I love the way you laugh at your own jokes before you even finish telling them.
Thank you for always knowing when I need silence and when I need you to talk to me.
I never thought a regular Tuesday could be my favorite day. Then I started spending them with you.

travel.text: Watch a sunset on the beach together
Get lost in a new city with no plan
Go on a train journey through the mountains
Stay in a tiny cabin in the middle of nowhere

experiences.text: Cook a fancy 3-course dinner at home
Watch all our favorite childhood movies
Take a dance class even if we are terrible
Write letters to our future selves
Go stargazing far from the city lights
Plant something together and watch it grow
